settings.title: StickyClick Settings
settings.heading: Configure your sticky button
settings.countdownEndTimeHelp: e.g. 2026-03-15T23:59:00Z. Leave blank for evergreen timer.
settings.countdownDurationHelp: Per-session countdown. e.g. 900 = 15 minutes. Only used if end date is blank.
settings.openCartDrawerHelp: When disabled, Add to Cart redirects to /cart (unless Quick Buy is enabled).
settings.analyticsTrackingHelp: Track add-to-cart events from the sticky button.
settings.basicFeatures: Basic: Sticky button core (status, text, colors, position)
settings.proFeatures: Pro: Upsell, Quick Buy, Cart Summary, Free Shipping Bar, Countdown Timer, Trust Badges
settings.premiumFeatures: Premium: Quantity Selector, Cart Drawer controls, Analytics Dashboard
settings.proBanner: Pro unlocks Upsell, Quick Buy, Cart Summary, Free Shipping Bar, Countdown Timer, and Trust Badges.
settings.premiumBanner: Premium unlocks Quantity Selector, Cart Drawer controls, and Analytics Dashboard.
settings.upsellVariantHelp: Numeric ID, full GID, or Browse.
settings.previewNote: Note: Save to update storefront behavior.
settings.analyticsCardDesc: View click and conversion data for your sticky button.
settings.toastPickerError: Could not open the variant picker
settings.errorSyncFailed: Settings saved to database but failed to sync to your storefront. Please try saving again.
settings.errorSaveFailed: Failed to save settings. Please try again.
settings.errorInvalidVariant: Enter a valid variant ID or use Browse.
settings.errorVariantNotFound: That variant was not found. Use Browse or check the ID.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.premiumBanner: Analytics is available on the Premium plan. Upgrade to see how your sticky button performs.

landing.title: StickyClick
landing.description: A sticky Add to Cart button that boosts conversions on your Shopify store.
landing.featureStickyDesc: A floating button that follows shoppers as they scroll, so they can add to cart anytime.
landing.featureUpsellDesc: Offer a recommended product alongside the main item and send customers straight to checkout.
landing.featureCartDesc: Show live cart totals and motivate larger orders with a progress bar toward free shipping.

login.heading: Log in
login.errorMissingShop: Please enter your shop domain to log in
login.errorInvalidShop: Please enter a valid shop domain to log in

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Need help with StickyClick?
support.contactDesc: For any inquiries, please contact our support team at:
support.reachOut: Reach out and we'll be happy to assist you!

privacy.title: Privacy Policy for StickyClick
privacy.introText: StickyClick ("we", "our", or "us") is a Shopify application that adds a configurable sticky add-to-cart experience to your storefront. This policy describes what we process when you install and use the app.
privacy.infoText: Depending on how you use StickyClick, we may process:
privacy.infoSessionText: When you open the app in the Shopify admin, we use Shopify's authentication to obtain an access token scoped to the permissions you approve. Session data is stored so the app can load your settings and sync configuration.
privacy.infoConfigText: We store per-shop settings you configure in the app (for example button text, colors, feature toggles). This is stored in our application database keyed by your shop domain.
privacy.infoMetafieldText: When you save settings, we write a JSON metafield on your shop (stickyclick.settings) so your theme app extension can read the same configuration on the storefront.
privacy.infoAnalyticsText: If you enable analytics, the storefront script sends aggregated events (such as impressions, clicks, and add-to-cart) to our servers through Shopify's signed App Proxy. Events may include your shop domain, event type, and product variant identifiers. We do not use this flow to collect buyer names, emails, or full payment details.
privacy.useText: We use the information above to provide and improve the Service: render the sticky button, sync settings to your storefront, and (when enabled) show analytics in the admin.
privacy.sharingText: We do not sell your personal information. We use service providers (for example hosting and database) to run the app. We may disclose information if required by law or to protect our rights.
privacy.retentionText: When you uninstall the app, we delete app sessions and remove stored shop settings and analytics events from our database where possible. We attempt to remove the shop metafield while the uninstall webhook still has valid access. Shopify may also send mandatory privacy webhooks (including shop data erasure) under our obligations as a Shopify app developer; we process those requests to delete remaining app-held data tied to your shop.
privacy.changesText: We may update this policy from time to time. Material changes will be reflected by updating the date above.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.introText: Welcome to StickyClick ("we", "our", or "us"). By installing and using StickyClick, you agree to be bound by the following terms and conditions.
terms.licenseText: Permission is granted to install and use the StickyClick Shopify application on your e-commerce store. This license is non-exclusive, non-transferable, and revocable at any time.
terms.disclaimerText: The materials and software on StickyClick are provided on an 'as is' basis. StickyClick makes no warranties, expressed or implied, and hereby disclaims and negates all other warranties including, without limitation, implied warranties or conditions of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement of intellectual property or other violation of rights.
terms.limitationsText: In no event shall StickyClick or its suppliers be liable for any damages (including, without limitation, damages for loss of data or profit, or due to business interruption) arising out of the use or inability to use the materials on StickyClick's website or application.
terms.accuracyText: The materials appearing on StickyClick's website or application could include technical, typographical, or photographic errors. StickyClick does not warrant that any of the materials on its website are accurate, complete or current.
terms.modificationsText: StickyClick may revise these terms of service for its application at any time without notice. By using this application you are agreeing to be bound by the then current version of these terms of service.
terms.governingText: These terms and conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Delaware and you irrevocably submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in that State or location.
terms.contactText: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at support@stickyclick.app.
